_comment: T1 scene (docs/production-track.md): torch training on the Mitsuba 'Country Kitchen' gallery scene at 512x512 / 64 spp. Download + export first: uv run python examples/scenes/download_scene.py kitchen && uv run python -m nrp.mitsuba_exporter --scene examples/scenes/kitchen/scene.xml --width 512 --height 512 --spp 64 --bounces 4 --out out/kitchen-512/path_cache.npz
